questions.text: Which of these is a biodegradable pollutant?
questions.explanation: Paper is biodegradable as it can be decomposed by microorganisms. Plastic, glass, and metal are non-biodegradable.

questions.text: Decomposers help in recycling of nutrients.
questions.explanation: Decomposers (bacteria, fungi) break down dead organic matter, releasing nutrients back into the ecosystem.

questions.correctAnswer: A network of interconnected food chains in an ecosystem.
questions.explanation: A food web shows how different food chains are interconnected. It shows multiple feeding relationships in an ecosystem.

questions.text: The flow of energy in an ecosystem is ________.
questions.explanation: Energy flows in one direction in an ecosystem: from sun → producers → consumers → decomposers.
